stage_description: TODO (Plan 1 placeholder): scientifically-backed description of the puppy stage (birth — sexual maturity, ~9 months for most sizes). Text will be replaced in Plan 2 after veterinarian review.
nutrition: TODO: feeding recommendations for puppies (4–5 meals/day, puppy-specific food, switch to adult food after sexual maturity). Source: AAHA 2019.
activity: TODO: short play sessions, active socialization (3–16 weeks — critical window), gentle exercise for growing joints.
veterinary_check_frequency: TODO: every 3–4 weeks until 16 weeks (vaccinations), then at 6 months. Source: AAHA 2019.
dental_care: TODO: daily brushing with puppy toothpaste from early age — builds habit.
warning_signs: TODO: diarrhea, vomiting, no appetite for over 12 hours, lethargy, pale gums.
disclaimer: This information is for educational purposes only and does not replace consultation with a veterinarian.
